data.content: Implementation complete on branch ship-c4a6-impl (commit 42ebc503). All 4 quality gates green. Path B refactor: (1) toCanonicalAgentConfig added to new agent-identity-canonical.ts as the single write-side extractor. (2) normalizeRegisteredAgentConfig is the sanctioned write-side caller. (3) settings.ts:loadSettings auto-migrates legacy entries (AC-B4 covered by 5 tests in settings-load-migration.test.ts). (4) getRegisteredAgents and toCliTarget are pure pass-throughs. (5) settings-agent-scan.ts and settings-agent-detect.ts route through canonicalizeScanFields. (6) Contract doc updated with Sanctioned Exceptions subsection; grep #2 returns zero hits. Tests: 314 files / 3127 tests pass.
